_comment: Single source of truth for per-pack lifecycle stage keys, order, and labels. The backend (api/index.js) reads this directly to validate/advance a deal room's stage — no code change needed to add a pack with new stage keys, only a new entry here. Frontend workflow pack files (ui/src/lib/workflowPacks/*.js) import this same file and layer cosmetic-only metadata (icon, desc) on top by key.
